title: gitmap list --update output
description: JSON payload emitted by `gitmap list --update --json` and `gitmap update list --json` (v6.80.0+).

current.description: Currently checked-out tag; null when detached or untagged.

behind.description: Number of release tags between current and latest; null when current is unknown.

path.description: Absolute path of the repo on disk.

lastProbeAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent VersionProbe row for this repo.
